refactor: rename survey-level axes (core→foundation, diff→progress+gap)

commit.message:
Complete booking system: multi-step flow, Supabase, pricing, availability, emails

- Install @supabase/supabase-js and resend
- lib/supabase.ts: Supabase client from env vars
- lib/pricing.ts: seasonal pricing (low/shoulder/high), per-day calculation, NZD formatter, add-on definitions
- lib/availability.ts: getUnavailableDates, rangesOverlap, isAvailable
- supabase/schema.sql: campers, bookings, blocked_dates tables with RLS policies
- app/api/send-email/route.ts: Resend email API — confirmation + enquiry templates + admin notification
- app/book/BookingFlow.tsx: 5-step booking flow with custom calendar, add-on selection, Supabase insert
- app/book/page.tsx: updated to use BookingFlow, reads searchParams for pre-fill
- Camper detail pages: seasonal pricing table + Book this camper CTA linking to /book?camper=slug

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: module system — defineModule, flow.use(), production defaults

New architecture: each package exports a ModuleDef with:
- id, label, settings schema with defaults
- nodes factory configured by settings
- enable/disable/configure at runtime

Packages:
- core: ModuleDef, SettingDef, defineModule(), getDefaults()
- core: flow.use(), flow.module(), flow.configure(), flow.enable/disable()
- storage: storageModule (OPFS + IndexedDB, full CRUD)
- ocr: ocrModule (language: 'pol')
- embed: embedModule (model, dtype, chunkSize, topK — all configurable)
- llm: llmModule (modelUrl, nCtx=4096, nPredict=1024, temp=0.3)

doc-analyzer rewritten to use flow.use() — zero hardcoded defaults.
Workspace configured for local development (examples/* in workspaces).

commit.message:
Fix: cache-bust translations.js to force fresh load on GitHub Pages CDN

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(call): add thin LLM wrapper command

Adds `oracle call --json [--driver X] [--model X]` — a unified interface
for callers that own their prompts (e.g. Sequence). Oracle handles driver
routing, auth, and output normalization; the caller provides the complete
prompt via stdin.

- Reads prompt from stdin (or `--input` for scripting/tests)
- Routes to configured driver (gemini/claude/codex) with `--driver` flag
- Respects `--model` and `--timeout` flags
- Returns raw parsed JSON from the LLM (no {success, data} wrapper)
- Falls back to global config / oracle.driver default when no flag given
- Exits 1 on empty stdin, LLM failure, or non-JSON response

commit.message:
feat: auto-sync DB status with Docker every 2 minutes

ContainerGCScheduler now runs syncDockerState() every 120s:
- Detects containers removed outside Manager (manual docker rm)
  and marks them REMOVED in DB, releasing port allocation
- Detects containers that changed state (running <-> exited)
  and updates DB status accordingly
- Logs every sync run and reports counts of records updated

This prevents the "11 in DB, 7 in Docker" discrepancy from
accumulating over time without manual intervention.

fix: pricing consistency, bell dot, back-lock, booking confirmation UX

- useBookingFlow: service fee always rounds UP (Math.ceil), per-person
  derived from whole-euro total to match displayed Total Group Cost
- summary/payment draftPricing: same ceiling+rounded-total pattern
- payment: per-person shown with decimal cents; deposit text formatted
  as "(€X = 25% Deposit Already Paid)" without minus sign

  based on isDepositOnly flag; full 3-level navigator traversal to
  disable back swipe + Android hardware back on all parent stacks

  in-memory budgetCache (synchronous) over AsyncStorage for instant
  bell dot clear after payment; invalidates event cache post-payment
- participantCountCache: expose getAllBudgetInfos() sync getter
- budget: Math.round (not Math.floor) for deposit display
- i18n en+de: preBookingTitle/Subtitle, finalBookingTitle/Subtitle

commit.message:
feat: ban system, slowmode, message pinning, @everyone, permission improvements

Backend:
- server_bans table (ban/unban endpoints, ban check on invite join)
- Role hierarchy: cannot kick/ban users with equal or higher role
- Slowmode: per-channel seconds stored in DB, enforced via Redis TTL per user
- Message pinning: pinned column, PUT /pin endpoint, GET /pinned list
- attach_files, create_invites, mention_everyone, pin_messages, manage_messages permissions enforced
- @everyone/@here broadcasts ping_received to all server members
- manage_messages allows deleting others messages and writing in announcement channels

Frontend:
- 13 permissions with descriptions in role modal
- Bans tab in server settings with unban button
- Ban button next to kick in members tab
- Slowmode selector in channel edit modal (5s–6h)
- Slowmode badge in channel header + blocking overlay with countdown in message input
- Pinned messages panel (slide-in from right) with pin/unpin per message
- Pin button on message hover (with pin_messages permission)
- Delete button visible for manage_messages users on others messages
- Attach button disabled without attach_files permission
- Invite Friends button hidden without create_invites permission

- What We Gave the World (Nobel prizes + Righteous Among Nations)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make daily-report.sh idempotent with Claude retries

Each phase is now skippable on re-run:
- Collect: queries DB for a successful run today
- Claude: checks output file for valid markdown content
- Email: uses a .sent marker file

Claude analysis retries up to 3 times on failure, writes to a temp
file first, and validates both exit code and output content (must
contain a markdown header) before accepting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: KDS real-time notification — write last_order_preparation_change after prep records

Root cause: action_pos_order_paid triggered _send_orders_to_preparation_display()
BEFORE pos.prep.state records were created (race condition). KDS received the bus
notification, re-queried Odoo, found no states → showed 0 orders.

Fix: Remove last_order_preparation_change from pos.order.create() (Step 1) so
action_pos_order_paid doesn't trigger premature notification. Add Step 5 that
writes it via pos.order.write() AFTER all prep records + states exist. The write()
triggers Odoo's bus notification → KDS WebSocket receives it → order appears.

Flow: Step 1 create → Step 2 payment+lines+prep_order → Step 3 paid+prep_lines →
Step 4 prep_states+read_name → Step 5 write(last_order_preparation_change) → KDS

commit.message:
Expand geocoverage to all 273 signs using Notion lat/lng

Added Latitude/Longitude columns to Notion CSV export. Generator now
reads coordinates directly from CSV and reverse-geocodes to census
tracts via Census TIGERweb API for the 57 previously unmatched signs.

Coverage before: 213/273 signs on map and in tract summaries
Coverage after:  273/273 signs — 100% placed

Tract growth:
  Tract 93: 87 → 99 signs (+12)
  Tract 94: 68 → 92 signs (+24)
  Tract 95: 47 → 68 signs (+21)
  Tract 96:  1 new coord-matched sign

Rename to logback.xml for early logback initialization

logback-spring.xml is only loaded by Spring Boot, but the status
messages come from logback's own init which runs before Spring.
Using logback.xml ensures logback finds the NopStatusListener early.
